updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Father > Day 3 > Lunch > Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

short_description.from: Colorful Mediterranean-inspired snack plate featuring hummus, whole-wheat pita, veggies, and a cheese component for protein, fiber, and healthy fats.
short_description.to: A café-style turkey and Havarti sandwich on artisan bread with lettuce, tomato, and a light spread — modeled after a popular Starbucks deli sandwich for a convenient, protein-forward lunch.

name.from: Hummus Snack Plate — Citrus Fresh Style

nutrition_note.from: This plate provides protein from hummus and cheese, plus fiber from whole-wheat pita and vegetables, and healthy fats from tahini in hummus. It offers a balanced mix of complex carbs, protein, and fats. Watch sodium from store-bought hummus and cheese; consider reduced-sodium options or smaller portions if needed. For a lighter version, you can reduce cheese or use part-skim options.
nutrition_note.to: Provides a good source of lean protein from turkey and calcium from Havarti. Contains moderate carbohydrates from the bread and some fat from cheese and spread. Likely higher in sodium than a homemade sandwich—choose lower-sodium turkey or skip added salt where possible. Pairing with fruit and vegetables boosts fiber and micronutrients for a balanced lunch.

meal_suggestion.from: As a Citrus Fresh-style snack: assemble with 2–3 tablespoons hummus, 1 small whole-wheat pita cut into wedges, cucumber slices, cherry tomatoes, and a small cheese wedge. Add a squeeze of lemon or citrus zest to brighten the flavors. If dairy-free, omit cheese or substitute with a plant-based option.
meal_suggestion.to: Serve the sandwich with a side of fresh fruit or a small side salad and water or unsweetened iced tea. For extra fiber and volume, add an apple or baby carrots. To increase protein, add an extra slice of turkey or a hard-boiled egg on the side.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the Day 3 lunch from a hummus snack plate into a Starbucks-style sandwich as requested. All meal fields rewritten to reflect the new sandwich meal identity and its nutritional profile.
